description: A photograph depicting a hilly, rural landscape under an overcast sky. In the foreground, there is an area of brownish-green, rough vegetation consistent with heathland or scrub. The midground features several bright green pastures, irregularly shaped and separated by low stone walls. Scattered rocks and boulders are visible within these pastures. In the background, further hills rise, covered with a mix of green and brown vegetation, and several white houses or buildings are scattered across the landscape. The image provides an example of a mixed landscape that could represent "Heathland and moorland" as described in CORINE Land Cover (CLC) and CLC+ nomenclature guidelines.
